## Summary

Describe the focused change and why it is needed.

## Security and data impact

- [ ] No credentials, real tenant data, device data, user data, or raw exports are included.
- [ ] Provider changes remain read-only and request no Microsoft Graph write permission.
- [ ] New or changed public fields have explicit sanitization classifications.
- [ ] Generated analysis remains labeled, evidence-grounded, and human-reviewed.
- [ ] Third-party code, content, data, and licenses are identified.

Explain any permission, data-flow, retention, workflow, or public static-artifact impact:

## Validation

List exact commands and results. Include the documentation build and public-artifact scan when the
change can affect a public static artifact.

## Evidence and rollout

Identify relevant issues, desired-state commits, schema versions, rollback steps, and deferred
work. Do not paste sensitive evidence into the pull request.
